subtasks.description: Scan IAM policies from AWS—extract principal ARNs, policy statements, permissions, and identify overly permissive grants (e.g., wildcards, root actions). Return structured policy inventory.

Query CloudTrail logs from SQL warehouse—aggregate API calls by principal, action, resource, and timestamp. Identify suspicious activity patterns (failed auth, privilege escalation attempts, unusual access times). Return audit event summary.

Reconcile IAM policy inventory (from scan_iam) with CloudTrail audit events (from audit_cloudtrail). Cross-reference actual API usage against allowed policies. Detect violations (e.g., actions taken outside permitted scope) and classify risk (critical/high/medium/low).

Evaluate policy violations and IAM posture against compliance frameworks (CIS, SOC2, PCI-DSS as applicable). Generate executive summary with violation counts, risk distribution, remediation recommendations, and compliance status per framework.

plan.cost_rationale: Four subtasks (minimum for end-to-end audit): (1) extract for IAM policy inventory (mid-tier due to multi-field structure and permission categorization); (2) sql_gen for CloudTrail log aggregation (mid-tier for multi-table join and pattern detection); (3) cross_recon at frontier tier to reconcile policies against logs, detect cross-signal violations, and classify risk severity—requires high reasoning; (4) policy_action at mid tier to map violations to compliance frameworks and generate governance assessment. No additional subtasks needed; classification and recommendations are embedded in cross_recon and policy_action outputs, not separate calls.

output.sql: SELECT user_id AS principal, action, resource, DATE_TRUNC('hour', access_time) AS event_hour, COUNT(*) AS event_count, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'denied' OR result = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_attempts, SUM(CASE WHEN permission ILIKE '%admin%' OR permission ILIKE '%root%' OR action ILIKE '%escalat%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS privilege_escalation_attempts, SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM access_time) < 6 OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM access_time) > 22 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unusual_hour_access FROM access_log_facts GROUP BY user_id, action, resource, DATE_TRUNC('hour', access_time) HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'denied' OR result = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 OR SUM(CASE WHEN permission ILIKE '%admin%' OR permission ILIKE '%root%' OR action ILIKE '%escalat%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 OR SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM access_time) < 6 OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM access_time) > 22 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY failed_attempts DESC, privilege_escalation_attempts DESC, event_count DESC LIMIT 500

audit_summary.reason: scan_iam returned empty policies array; cannot perform cross-reference analysis
audit_summary.recommendation: Ensure scan_iam completes successfully and returns policy definitions before attempting violation detection and risk classification

Confirm CloudTrail logs are accessible and queryable
Validate data pipeline: upstream_outputs.policy_violations.reconciled must contain policy data
Resubmit task only after prerequisites satisfied
